# tbm_compat_runtime.txt
# Generated by Tools/tbm_compat_tool.py — do not edit manually.
# Re-run 'tbm_compat_tool.py build' to regenerate.
###############################################################################

tbm_clear_auto_compat_profile_flags = {
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_doctrine_safe
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_blackice
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_cold_war_iron_curtain
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserreich
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_endsieg
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_extended_tech_tree_1960
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_novum_vexillum
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_rise_of_nations
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserredux
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_new_order
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_millennium_dawn
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_fire_rises
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war_redux
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war
    clr_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_road_to_56
}

tbm_auto_detect_compat_profile = {
    tbm_clear_auto_compat_profile_flags = yes
    if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            country_exists = BMP
            country_exists = EHA
            country_exists = HAT
            country_exists = PGR
            country_exists = SCC
            country_exists = SDC
            country_exists = SKC
            country_exists = XIA
            country_exists = YUT
            country_exists = ZXL
        }
        }
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_blackice
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            country_exists = BAD
            country_exists = BAV
            country_exists = BCP
            country_exists = BCR
            country_exists = BTG
            country_exists = CVD
            country_exists = DOC
            country_exists = DRY
            country_exists = FNL
            country_exists = FUL
            country_exists = HOK
            country_exists = INO
            country_exists = KAS
            country_exists = KAY
            country_exists = KMP
            country_exists = KPA
            country_exists = LOS
            country_exists = MLA
            country_exists = MNL
            country_exists = NLF
            country_exists = PDG
            country_exists = SGP
            country_exists = SMI
            country_exists = SMK
            country_exists = SVI
            country_exists = SWK
            country_exists = TNG
            country_exists = TOA
            country_exists = TRS
            country_exists = UNS
        }
        }
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_cold_war_iron_curtain
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            country_exists = HND
            country_exists = HNN
            country_exists = IMP
            country_exists = KUM
            country_exists = SHD
            country_exists = SPA
            country_exists = WIF
        }
        }
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserreich
        set_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_doctrine_safe
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            country_exists = ANA

            country_exists = CNT

        }

    else_if = {

    else_if = {

            country_exists = ACR

tbm_assign_power_tier_for_profile = {
    if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_BLACKICE }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_blackice
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_blackice = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_CWIC }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_cold_war_iron_curtain
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREICH }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserreich
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_kaiserreich = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ENDSIEG }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_endsieg
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_endsieg = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ETT1960 }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_extended_tech_tree_1960
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_NOVUM_VEXILLUM }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_novum_vexillum
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_novum_vexillum = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_RISE_OF_NATIONS }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_rise_of_nations
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_rise_of_nations = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREDUX }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserredux
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_kaiserredux = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_TNO }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_new_order
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_the_new_order = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_MILLENNIUM_DAWN }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_millennium_dawn
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_millennium_dawn = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_TFR }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_fire_rises
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_the_fire_rises = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_GREAT_WAR_REDUX }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war_redux
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_great_war_redux = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_GREAT_WAR }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_great_war = yes
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ROAD_TO_56 }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_road_to_56
            }
        }
        }
        tbm_assign_power_tier_road_to_56 = yes
    }
    else = {
        tbm_assign_power_tier = yes
    }
}

tbm_grant_techs_for_profile = {
    if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_BLACKICE }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_blackice
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_blackice = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_blackice = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_blackice = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_blackice = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_blackice = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_blackice value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_blackice = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_CWIC }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_cold_war_iron_curtain
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_cold_war_iron_curtain value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_cold_war_iron_curtain = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREICH }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserreich
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_kaiserreich = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserreich value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_kaiserreich = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ENDSIEG }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_endsieg
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_endsieg = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_endsieg = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_endsieg = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_endsieg = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_endsieg = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_endsieg = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_endsieg = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_endsieg = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_endsieg value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_endsieg = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ETT1960 }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_extended_tech_tree_1960
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_extended_tech_tree_1960 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_extended_tech_tree_1960 = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_NOVUM_VEXILLUM }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_novum_vexillum
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_novum_vexillum = yes

        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }

            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
