                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_novum_vexillum value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_novum_vexillum = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_RISE_OF_NATIONS }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_rise_of_nations
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_rise_of_nations value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_rise_of_nations = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREDUX }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_kaiserredux
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_kaiserredux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_kaiserredux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_kaiserredux = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_TNO }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_new_order
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_the_new_order = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_the_new_order = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_the_new_order = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_the_new_order = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_new_order value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_the_new_order = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_MILLENNIUM_DAWN }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_millennium_dawn
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_millennium_dawn value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_millennium_dawn = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_TFR }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_the_fire_rises
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_GREAT_WAR_REDUX }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war_redux
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_GREAT_WAR }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_great_war
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_great_war = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_great_war = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_great_war = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_great_war = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_great_war value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_great_war = yes
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
        OR = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ROAD_TO_56 }
            AND = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_road_to_56
            }
        }
        }
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
    else = {
        # --- LAND branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic = yes
        }
        # --- AIR branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_cas = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport = yes
        }
        # --- NAVAL branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support = yes
        }
        # --- INDUSTRY branch ---
        set_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 0 }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_initialize_doctrine_paths_for_profile = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            tbm_doctrine_allowed = yes
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_VANILLA }
                AND = {
                    has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                    OR = {
                        NOT = { has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected }
                        has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_doctrine_safe
                    }
                }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREICH }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ENDSIEG }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ETT1960 }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREDUX }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ROAD_TO_56 }
            }
        }
        tbm_initialize_doctrine_paths = yes
    }
}

tbm_grant_doctrines_for_profile = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            tbm_doctrine_allowed = yes
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_VANILLA }
                AND = {
                    has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_AUTO }
                    OR = {
                        NOT = { has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_profile_detected }
                        has_global_flag = tbm_compat_auto_doctrine_safe
                    }
                }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREICH }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ENDSIEG }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ETT1960 }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_KAISERREDUX }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_compat_profile option = TBM_COMPAT_ROAD_TO_56 }
            }
        }
        tbm_grant_doctrines = yes
    }
}
